productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: Composition Dark blue denim trousers with two side pockets, patch pocket above right pocket, two back pockets with a patch pocket above the right one, reinforced stitch detailing in the crotch area, zippered and buttoned front, comfortable waist with loops to hold a belt and natural creases along the upper thigh Fitting Slim Wash care Pre-soak the garment before wash Preferably hand wash inside out with zippers and buttons fastened, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not attempt to remove stains by spot washing Flat dry or drip dry on hanger and avoid wringing Preferably steam iron Don that casually stylish look with this naturally creased denim trouser from united colors of benetton. Pair it with informal shirts, preferably those with fold-over sleeves, and suede shoes to look every bit like the casually handsome guy that you are. Model statistics The model wears jeans of length 40 cm Height: 6.2', Waist: 32”
